response.justification: The candidate clears the 15-year experience bar with broad full-stack, systems, and open-source work, plus founder experience and public speaking, but his career has been at the senior/staff IC level rather than principal or director scope. AI exposure is recent and tooling-oriented (MCP generators, agent infrastructure) rather than the recognized AI expertise with demonstrated AI products the role centers on, and there is no advanced AI-related degree or evidence of strategic advisory work with executives or customers.
strengths: 18+ years of hands-on engineering across web, embedded, low-latency, and cloud systems
Entrepreneurial track record as founder of an open-source geo-data platform used in production
Communicates well externally — conference talks, workshops, and courses align with the evangelism aspect of the role
concerns: No principal/director-level scope or organization-wide technical leadership evidence
AI experience is recent developer tooling, not recognized AI expertise or shipped AI products at scale
No advanced degree in an AI-related field and limited cloud-platform strategy background

key_factors.factor: Long, broad engineering experience with founder background
